-- 1 of 3 --

https://www.facebook.com/coachleehaight/videos/961444880678706/
Here are examples of different ads for call to actions too:
60 second video for people who don't know you - Make a 60 second video going over the
problems your ideal customer or client has. 3-4 problems, then talk about your free thing or
product being available and go right into the results (3-4 results) the person gets if they take
action by pressing the button in the bottom right corner or by clicking the link above.
ex: http://fb.me/1R0kbOYE31RkwpW
ex: http://fb.me/29C6evTGd17D7Ht
2 minute video for people who don't know you - 3-4 problems, free thing or product being
available, 3-4 results or solutions that happen when the person takes action by pressing the
button in the bottom corner or by pressing the link above. You can also story tell plugging the
same format.
ex: http://fb.me/1IVsENC2rSDgg7g
ex: http://fb.me/26CJDXobn60NZPm
ex: http://fb.me/1Ix6L1ZaAfFryC5
4 retargeting videos - Story tell, directly call out, or bring up different problems the potential
customer, client, or lead are experiencing but go into detail on it more, and then relate it the
solution and results they could get with the thing they've seen but haven't taken action on yet.
Also feel free to call out actions you know they've taken like viewed offer pages, watched ad
videos, seen these things several times but haven't taken action yet to better themselves, etc.
ex: http://fb.me/bofGplpuPWvyEz
ex: http://fb.me/9eIFeb1PD3GVv4
ex: http://fb.me/8P7HUoGVV8fM6W
ex: http://fb.me/1WRXymV5lJMl47Z
ex: http://fb.me/1IaBlb9EqcYqtFo
ex: http://fb.me/9e8oI3zRmHDCgw
ex: http://fb.me/25ZfzRUF4Bui5YV
ex: http://fb.me/bchjlVgWSsAR2C
2 15 second vertical video for instastories - These need to be quick, your call to action is for
them to swipe up, and you're either quickly covering 1-2 problems and the solution or results
(1-2) being possible by swiping up, or creatively get them to swipe up to get xyz.
ex: http://fb.me/2dSloT1luwlO3i8
ex: http://fb.me/bN9D7HYU1SmP16
ex: http://fb.me/23etdeDDOHODHxS
ex: http://fb.me/8QfsG8C1fH0orV
2 retargeting videos for insta stories 15 seconds and vertical - if someone doesn't take action on
a giveaway or a product/offer, they are going to be retargeted until they do. In under 15 seconds
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 3 --

be sure to tell them to swipe up to take action on getting the thing that they forgot to take action
on and why in under 15 seconds.
ex: http://fb.me/1QqE1AHHaEM9rWv
ex: http://fb.me/2eVXhhlqqPfl6nE
ex: http://fb.me/1O8p9Fjts7VwBsD
ex: http://fb.me/1FoFn9dA6YTPVv1
simple 'you didn't buy, come back and take action video' - This is a direct call out that the person
seeing this video saw an offer, ad video or opportunity to take action to get something for free
from you, or to get a product or offer that they didn't buy. Call them out creatively on the fact that
they didn't do what they needed to do to get themselves to the state where they get the 3-4
results you're going to remind they can get through these videos where you're calling them out
and then reminding them to take action by pressing the button below or pressing the link above
to get xyz.
ex: http://fb.me/22BtLSxM6ZVlrhV
ex: http://fb.me/1H802TyAQ9knjXY
ex: http://fb.me/1W986VijHkcUrRy
ex: http://fb.me/1FJdTUxQzDI2tTq
ex: http://fb.me/2a1AEAPHQJGPMJk
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
